use_codes.desc: ADASUVE IS A TYPICAL ANTIPSYCHOTIC INDICATED FOR THE ACUTE TREATMENT OF AGITATION ASSOCIATED WITH SCHIZOPHRENIA OR BIPOLAR I DISORDER IN ADULTS

indications.text:
ADASUVE is indicated for the acute treatment of agitation associated with schizophrenia or
bipolar I disorder in adults.
“Psychomotor agitation” is defined in DSM-IV as “excessive motor activity associated with a
feeling of inner tension.” Patients experiencing agitation often manifest behaviors tha...
